Also have no idea who made this. But there’s like 10+ more of them and it’s KILLING me fr. And has anyone noticed how much Twisted Shelly’s been on the increased chance board?? Broski had it three days in a row this is pissing me off I NEED Pebble…

Also, I wanna make a Dandy’s Block bot, but don’t know which one to make, or if I should make a bot with ALL of them. (At least the ones with current lore and have been in a comic. I.e.; Goob, Stro, Scraps, Shanks, S&D, Shakes, Pop, etc) SO PLS PLS PLS GIVE ME SUGGESTIONS ON THAT TOO!!
